title: Bang Bang Betty: Valerie's Revenge
overview: Valerie and her partner Beatrice, both lovers and undercover operatives, infiltrate the criminal network of Cartel Sanchez, a ruthless drug lord. When Beatrice is tragically killed during the mission, Valerie embarks on a relentless quest for revenge, stopping at nothing to bring the cartel down.
